reason: AgentEvent union types (message_start/update/end, turn_*, agent_end, tool_execution_*, queue_update, model_update); harness.subscribe + prompt signatures
print/json mode failures must exit 1 with stderr; bootstrap errors already handled by cli.fail
stderr for errors/warnings; stdout for print/json output only
projectEvent is the single event→plain-object decoder for headless mode; consumers use projected output, not raw events
